## 🔖 Version Update Checklist (MANDATORY if chart is modified)

- [ ] Updated `version` in `Chart.yaml`
- [ ] Updated `appVersion` in `Chart.yaml`

> ⚠️ PRs modifying Helm charts without version updates should NOT be merged.
